#   cd /tmp/flart_test_app
#   sed -i.bak "1i\\
#   import 'dart:io';" lib/main.dart

#   mv lib/main.dart.bak lib/main.dart

Computing fixes in flart_test_app (dry run)...

1 proposed fix in 1 file.

lib/main.dart
  unused_import - 1 fix

To fix an individual diagnostic, run one of:
  dart fix --apply --code=unused_import

To fix all diagnostics, run:
  dart fix --apply
